    Constructor

    SigningWorkflow(CodesignClient client, Duration pollInterval, Duration completionTimeout, Consumer<String> logger)
    Creates a workflow with an optional completion timeout.
     
    SigningWorkflow(CodesignClient client, Duration pollInterval, Consumer<String> logger)
    Creates a workflow that polls indefinitely (no completion deadline).
